"Moneybags" Martin is a unique
Boss
creature that can be found in
Cronley's Hideout
. Killing him is necessary for the
A Life for an Eye
quest.
Family :
Human
Genus :
Cronley's Gang

Aethoran, the Plaguebearer is a
Reanimator
hero creature.
Family: Aether Corruption
Genus: Dominator
Aether Conflagration
Aetherfire Aura
Arcane Blast
Disease Cloud
Gas Cloud
Summon Zombie
Summon Aetherfire Zombie
Resistances
Level 2
Hero/Boss Resistances
Aether: 50%
Poison & Acid: 50%
Knockdown: 500%

Alberran Rein
is an
Aether Corruption
boss located in the
Chamber of the High Council
. He is the target of the quest
Rise of the Insurgence
.

======================================================================
PAGE: Alkamos, Lord Executioner
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Alkamos,_Lord_Executioner
======================================================================

Alkamos, Lord Executioner is a unique
Boss
creature that can be found in the fifth and last level of
The Steps of Torment
:
Anguish
.
Family:
Undead
Genus:
Haunted Champion

melee

======================================================================
PAGE: Anasteria
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Anasteria
======================================================================

Anasteria
(also known as The Outcast) is a Possessed witch in
Fort Ikon Prison
. She is the focus of
The Aetherial Witch
quest.
The player can choose to either to ally with her (giving them
The Outcast
faction quests), or to kill her, transforming her into a unique boss creature (and giving them access to a new dungeon within
Fort Ikon Prison
)
Family:
Human
Genus:
Witch
Lore
Not much is known about the enigmatic Anasteria, or why she knows so much about the
Aetherials
and their plans for humanity. She seemingly arrived out of nowhere, her hands raised high above her head as she approached the Legion forces in the north. She was immediately taken to the Inquisitor, who the
Black Legion
brass decided would be the most experienced in dealing with witches and sorcery. Before the Grim Dawn, witches would often be tried and burnt on the same day they were captured, their position in society beneath even that of occultists.
Anasteria was brought before
Creed
bound in chains. She could seldom lift a finger without a Legion Myrmidon reaching for his blade. Creed insisted upon calm. He too was cautious of this mysterious arrival, but he was willing to hear her out before condemning her to the noose. Anasteria spoke at length about all she had learned about the Aetherials through her premonitions and warnings from the bones.
What sparked Creed’s attention though was mention of an impending Aetherial attack upon a Legion camp out in the
Asterkarn Valley
. Creed motioned for the guards to deliver this information to Commander Lucius immediately. Perhaps Anasteria was lying, but if she was right then Legion lives were at stake. Creed was not willing to take that chance. An eldritch familiar was sent out at once to warn the scouts of the attack. Creed and Anasteria sat in silence, awaiting the result of her warning.
Within the hour,
Commander Lucius
himself entered the room to inform Creed of Aetherial forces pouring into the Asterkarn Mountains through a pass they had believed was too snowed in for anyone to cross. Thanks to Anasteria’s warning, the scouts were able to retreat in time. Creed and Lucius eyed the witch with curiosity, her mask hiding any indication of her reaction to the news. Creed ordered that Anasteria’s shackles be removed. If they were to continue talking, they would do so on equal terms.
Creed asked to be left alone with the mysterious witch. They talked for hours about the Aetherial plans for assimilating humanity, but when Creed’s questions got too specific, she would shrug and draw a blank. Her knowledge, it seemed, still had its limits. There were secrets about the Aetherials that even this witch did not know, or perhaps refused to share. Nevertheless, Anasteria was willing to help the Legion fight their powerful foe.
Creed emerged from the interrogation chamber with Anasteria in tow. He declared that no harm was to come to the witch under severe penalty. She carried valuable information that could save lives. The Commander scowled at her, not entirely comfortable with having such a pariah within his walls, but he respected Creed’s wishes. Anasteria, with her life secured, presented the Legion command with detailed information on Aetherial movement in the area, as well as where they planned to strike next. None could fathom how she came upon this information, but with her earlier warning proving all too accurate, they were not willing to take any chances.
Anasteria’s information proved to be eerily accurate at first, allowing the Legion to cripple Aetherial forces with unexpected attacks, or to retreat where the situation was hopeless. She had singlehandedly saved countless human lives, though hardly anyone in the Legion was willing to admit it. Over time, her knowledge became more spotty, until eventually the day came when she was wrong. The enemy, it seems, has adjusted their tactics.
With her knowledge spent, many in the Legion started calling for her swift execution, branding her an unnatural witch and a heathen, but Inquisitor Creed insisted that she had earned their trust and deserved to live, despite any predispositions the soldiers may have towards her kind. For now, Creed’s command seems to be respected; but how long will it be before someone in the Legion decides to take justice into their own hands? You arrive at Fort Ikon during a contentious time. What will Anasteria’s fate be? That may well fall upon you.
Ashes of Malmouth
If Anasteria survived
Fort Ikon
, she will move to the
Malmouth Resistance
base together with
Inquisitor Creed
. Anasteria suspects that
Korinia
is hiding something and "more powerful than she lets on".
Quotes
What a marvel you are. They say that to become one with an Aetherial you must lose all that defines you, but it seems there is more to the mystery than rumor lets on?  The Aether holds many secrets, but few are held from me. There are those who fear such power, but...that is why you're here. No?
I have great talent for manipulating the Aether, and I have dabbled in divination, which I suppose is where the superstitious soldiers draw their ire.  Everybody claims they want to know the future, until they actually hear it. It is difficult to separate the bad from the good when so much pain awaits a mortal in their lifetime.
"Why would you betray your own kind?" - Player"
Before I turned upon my masters, I was tasked with conquering the northlands, starting with
Homestead
. But inhabiting a human has opened my eyes to an existence I had thought futile and temporary. Human lives, despite being so brief and ultimately pointless, are so rich and full of wonder. I have come to develop feelings for your species, a concept most Aetherials cannot even fathom. Ultimately, I see our domination of humanity as cruel. I could no longer contribute to your assimilation.
"What is an
Aetherial
really?" - Player
We were the servants of the primordial gods, but when our makers grew jealous of one another, we became soldiers in a cataclysmic war.  Countless creations were eradicated by the ensuing conflict, countless millennia of our work erased in a flicker of godly anger. But none of that compared to the day one side chose to harness the darkness of the void in a desperate bid for victory.  The results were catastrophic and our masters were cut down or scattered to the far reaches of creation. And we, the most loyal servants, were banished to the Aether for the simple crime of serving without question.  There, stripped of our physical forms, we were forced to wander the emptiness of the stars for all eternity, the scars inflicted upon us by the void's minions still burning deep. That is until we encountered humans...
"What changed when you found us?" - Player
Human ingenuity...and greed. Your base desires to seek out power are only matched by your ability to adapt and manifest that power in impressive displays. It was the reckless actions of the first arcanists that drew us to this world and it was our whispers that taught your people how to first tap into the limitless potential of the Aether. All it took was a push in the right direction. We had to be patient, but eventually enough of us were able to breach the veil and take matters into our own "hands" and prepare for the Glorious Dawn that would see all Aetherials return to the physical realm.  But our actions were not without consequence. Though Chthonian worship was not a new prospect on Cairn, desperate humans made willing allies for the powers of Ch'thon and so an old enemy has returned to haunt us and may well spell doom for us all. Even now as we slaughter one another, the void feeds upon the spilled blood and grows to envelop all of creation.
Abilities
Aether Field
Annihilation
Arcane Missile
Devastation
Enrage
Orbiting Aether
Reputation-Based Abilities
Despised Level: Minions of the Outcast
Anasteria will have two Ironside Hulks to back her at the beginning of the encounter.
Hated Level: Wrath of the Outcast
Anasteria will become
Anasteria, Harbringer of the North
, with increased stats.
Nemesis Level: Vengeance of the Outcast
Anasteria will become
Anasteria, Wrath of the Aether
, with increased Health, Health Regen, Spirit and Resistances.
Resistances
Level 4/5/5
Hero/Boss Resistances
Physical: 25%
Pierce: 25%
Fire: 15/20/25%
Cold: 15/20/25%
Lightning: 15/20/25%
Aether: 40%
Knockdown: 500%
Notable Drops
Grand Spoils
Magnificent Spoils
(when Nemesis level)
Tainted Brain Matter
Outcast's Hood
(Epic Helm): 3-5% Chance on Hated
Outcast's Secret
(Legendary Helm): 15% Chance on Nemesis
See also
Hagarond
is another aetherial with admiration and compassion for the human plight

Burrwitch Outskirts
.

======================================================================
PAGE: Archmage Aleksander
CATEGORIES: Nemesis
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Archmage_Aleksander
======================================================================

Archmage Aleksander
is a
Nemesis Spawn
of the
Aetherial Vanguard
faction that comes with the
Ashes of Malmouth
expansion.
He is an Ultra Boss of Grim Dawn so the player must be prepared for that encounter.
Family:
Human
Genus:
Aetherial Vanguard
Spawn Points
Burning Cellar
Malmouth Sewers
Candle District
Crown Hill
Fleshworks
Malmouth Harbor
Ransacked Lighthouse
Steelcap District
The Infestation
Abilities
Damage Types: Aether, Elemental, Physical
Spit Aetherfire (Aether, Fire)
Panetti's Replicating Missile Nova (Elemental)
Panetti's Replicating Missile Nova (Aether)
Aether Skyshard (Aether, Fire, Physical)
Summon Aether Shard (Aether, Cold, Physical)
Resistances
Level 6
Hero/Boss Resistances
18% Fire Resistance
18% Cold Resistance
73% Lightning Resistance
18% Poison & Acid Resistance
35% Pierce Resistance
18% Bleeding Resistance
80% Vitality Resistance
73% Aether Resistance
18% Chaos Resistance
Notable Drops
Aleksander can drop either of two
Monster Infrequent
Leg Armor pieces:
Aleksander's Chausses
Aleksander's Legguards
Masteries
Items
Creatures
Factions
Locations

======================================================================
PAGE: Archon Barthollem
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Archon_Barthollem
======================================================================

Archon Barthollem
is a unique
Boss
creature that can be found in the level 2 of the
Tomb of Archon Barthollem
if the player has chosen to ally with the
Order of Death's Vigil
.
Killing him is necessary to complete
The Sacred Ashes
, because he drops the
Desecrated Ashes of Empyrion
quest item. He will not spawn in the dungeon at all until you have received said quest.
Family:
Undead
Genus:
Haunted Champion
Abilities
Ember Charge
Enrage
Fire Wave
Ring of Fire
Inferno
Resistances
Level 4
Hero/Boss Resistances
Physical: 8%
Pierce: 8%
Vitality: 30%
Knockdown: 500%
Sleep: 500%
Stun: 50%
Trap: 50%
Notable Drops
Supreme Spoils
Desecrated Ashes of Empyrion
(quest)
Barthollem's Warmaul
(Monster Infrequent)
Masteries

======================================================================
PAGE: Avris Marrowill
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures

This article is a
stub
. You can help Grim Dawn Wiki by
expanding it
.
This article is a
stub
. You can help Grim Dawn Wiki by
expanding it
.
Avris
is a unique boss that can be found in one of two locations, the
Decrepit Cellar
and the
Overgrown Cellar
. Avris is an Ugdenbog cannibal.

======================================================================
PAGE: Baldim, the Chaosbringer
CATEGORIES: Hero Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Baldim,_the_Chaosbringer
======================================================================

Baldim, the Chaosbringer is very large Carrion Raptor Hero creature, Fast and powerful, It's main attack is using it's claws via melee. It also attacks by stirring up dirt to slow it's target and dealing low amounts of damage. Ranged, it will shoot a magical mine randomly, stepping on the mine will deal massive amounts of damage.
Family: Riftspawn
Genus: Raptor

Balegor, the Swamp King
is a unique boss creature located in the
East Marsh
.

Beastkin

Troll

Enrage
Rage
Poison Blast

Bandragos, Thrall of Dravis
is an
Undead
boss found in the
Cinder Wastes
. Bandragos needs to be killed in the quest
Family Matters
.

======================================================================
PAGE: Bargoll, the Mouldering Mound
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Bargoll,_the_Mouldering_Mound
======================================================================

Bargoll, the Mouldering Mound
is a Swamp Golem
Boss
creature, with six possible spawn locations around
Ugdenbog
.
He deals heavy Poison & Acid Damage.
Abilities

======================================================================
PAGE: Baron Wradlith, Lord of the Lost Souls
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Baron_Wradlith,_Lord_of_the_Lost_Souls
======================================================================

Baros Wradlith, Lord of the Lost Souls is a
Boss
creature that can be found in
Spined Cove
. It is possible to obtain a
Bounty
for killing him with the
Rovers
faction. When actually encountered, he is referred to by game's UI as "Baros" Wradlith, which is possibly a typo.
Family:
Undead
Genus:
Haunted Champion
Abilities
Cadence (Cold damage, -33% current life)
Ghostly Fireball Burst (Cold & Vitality Damage, Life Leech, Total Speed Reduction)
Ghostly Fireball Nova (Cold & Vitality Damage, Life Leech, Total Speed Reduction)
Ring of Flame (Cold, Fire, Frostburn Damage)
Resistances
Level 2
Hero/Boss Resistances
Vitality: 30%
Physical 8%
Pierce 8%
Sleep 500
Knockdown 500
Notable Drops
Spectral Bludgeon
Wradlith's Bulwark
Grand Spoils
Masteries
Items
Creatures
Factions
Locations

======================================================================
PAGE: Barrostrandt, the Ascended
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Barrostrandt,_the_Ascended
======================================================================

Barrostrandt, the Ascended is a Reanimator boss creature. He is the target for the
Order of Death's Vigil
Bounty
The Ascended
, available after reaching
Respected
with Death's Vigil.
He can summon several (3-5) minions and is found anywhere inside the
Warden's Cellar.
Further exploration of the lab is required as it varies from player to player. Some players have found him in Warden Krieg's boss room.
Barrostrandt, the Ascended

======================================================================
PAGE: Bloodfeast the Ruthless
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Bloodfeast_the_Ruthless
======================================================================

Bloodfeast the Ruthless is a unique
Boss
creature found in
Tyrant's Hold
.
Race:
Beastkin
Type:
Dranghoul
Abilities
Impale
Last Stand
Crimson Spout
Frenzy Roar
Resistances
Level 4
Hero/Boss Resistances
Cold Resistance: 20%
Fire Resistance: 20%
Lightning Resistance: 20%
Physical Resistance: 20%
Pierce Resistance: 15%
Reduced Knockdown Duration: 500%
Notable Drops
Supreme Spoils
Masteries

======================================================================
PAGE: Bloodlord Thalonis
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Bloodlord_Thalonis
======================================================================

Bloodlord Thalonis
is a unique
Boss
creature that can be found in the
Seal of the Loghorrean
. He must be killed in order to gain access to the
Edge of Madness
.
Family:
Human
Genus:
Bloodsworn
Abilities
Chaos Bolt
Curse
Nova Life Drain
Chaos Barrage
Chaos Bolt
Chaos Vortex
Summon Chthonian Harbinger
Resistances
Level 4
Hero/Boss Resistances
25% Chaos Resistance
25% Vitality Resistance
500% Reduced Freeze Duration
500% Reduced Knockdown Duration
Notable Drops
Grand Spoils
Bloodlord's Blade
Bloodsworn Sigil
Chthonic Seal of Binding
The Final Seal (note)
Masteries

======================================================================
PAGE: Bollag, Keeper of the Gates
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Bollag,_Keeper_of_the_Gates
======================================================================

This article is a
stub
. You can help Grim Dawn Wiki by
expanding it
.
This article is a
stub
. You can help Grim Dawn Wiki by
expanding it
.
Bollag, Keeper of the Gates
is a massive
Aetherial
boss. When you obtain the quest
Someone on the Inside
he will appear next to the lever for the drawbridge in that quest, which is technically part of the
Malmouth Outskirts
that you get to from the
Candle District
. If you get the quest
Bounty: Keeper of the Gates
he will have 4 spawn points in
Candle District
.

======================================================================
PAGE: Bolvar, the Bloodbinder
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Bolvar,_the_Bloodbinder
======================================================================

Bolvar, the Bloodbinder is a unique
Boss
creature that can be found in
The Blood Grove
, in the vicinity of the Ruined Shrine.
Family:
Human
Genus:
Bloodsworn
Abilities
Chaos Barrage
Chaos Aura
Summon
Chthonian Devourer
Nova Life Drain
Summon
Void Fiend
Ring of Chaos
Resistances
20% Cold Resistance
20% Fire Resistance
20% Lightning Resistance
15% Physical Resistance
20% Pierce Resistance
Notable Drops
Grand Spoils
Blood of Ch'thon
(35% Chance)
Masteries

======================================================================
PAGE: Boris, Master of the Pit
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Boris,_Master_of_the_Pit
======================================================================

Boris, Master of the Pit is a
Boss
creature located inside the fighting pit enclosure in the
Four Hills
.
Family:
Human
Genus: Murderer
Abilities
Skill Name
Skill Type
Damage Type
Triple Strike
melee
x Physical Damage
x Bleeding Damage
x% Weapon Damage
Warcry
AoE Debuff
8 Meter Radius
-35% Current Life
-x Defensive Ability for 5 Seconds
-40% Movement Speed for 3 Seconds
Berserk
Buff
12 Second Duration
24 Second Skill Cooldown
+25% Physical Damage
+50% Increased Bleeding Duration
10% Physical Resistance
10% Pierce Resistance
500% Confusion Resistance
500% Convert Resistance
500% Fear Resistance
500% Freeze Resistance
500% Knockdown Resistance
500% Petrify Resistance
500% Sleep Resistance
500% Stun Resistance
500% Taunt Resistance
500% Trap Resistance
33% Total Speed Reduction Resistance
Resistances
Level 4
Hero/Boss Resistances
Physical: 15%
Pierce: 15%
Knockdown: 500%

Pit Master's Axe

======================================================================
PAGE: Callagadra, Scion of the Sands
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Callagadra,_Scion_of_the_Sands
======================================================================

This article is a
stub
. You can help Grim Dawn Wiki by
expanding it
.
This article is a
stub
. You can help Grim Dawn Wiki by
expanding it
.
Callagadra, Scion of the Sands
is a Celestial Secret Boss in the game. She is found in the
Korvan Sands
area. You must have a
Celestial Essence
item and use the Sacrificial Altar in the area to summon her.
She's level 86 on Normal and 112 on Elite.

======================================================================
PAGE: Clone of John Bourbon
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Clone_of_John_Bourbon
======================================================================

This article is a
stub
. You can help Grim Dawn Wiki by
expanding it
.
This article is a
stub
. You can help Grim Dawn Wiki by
expanding it
.
Clone of John Bourbon
is a secret
Celestial
Super Boss. He is found in the
Edge of Reality
which is accessed by completing
Daila's Secret Quest
.
He splits upon death for a total of four times before becoming the The Actually Final Form of the Clone of John Bourbon. The fight will end when this form of him is defeated.
Trivia
The Clone of John Bourbon is an in-joke dating back to the Early Access period of development. Prior to the game's completion, when the player came to the end of existing content they would encounter the Clone of John Bourbon, an NPC who would inform the player they had completed all current content and could go no further.

Commander Lucius
Race
Aether Corruption
Type
Boss
Faction
Aetherials
Commander Lucius
is a unique
Boss
creature that can be found in the
Fort Ikon Armory
.
Killing him is necessary to complete the
Betrayal at Fort Ikon
quest. He drops the
Legion Heavy Explosives
necessary to the next part of the quest.

Crate of Entertainment
is a
Celestial
Secret Boss in the game. To access this boss fight you must follow the quest line
Crate Secret Quest
.

expanding it
.
Cyrian Marcan
is an
Aether Corruption
boss located in the
Chamber of the High Council
. He is the target of the quest
Rise of the Insurgence
.

======================================================================
PAGE: Darius Cronley
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Darius_Cronley
======================================================================

Darius Cronley is a
Boss
creature located in
Cronley's Hideout
. Killing him is necessary to complete the
An Old Threat
quest, during which the player must first talk to him before the fight begins.
Family: Human - Aetherial
Genus:
Cronley's Gang
Abilities
Skill Name
Skill Type
Damage Type
Passive
12% to 14% Chance to Deflect Projectiles
8% Chance to Disrupt Skills for 1.5 Seconds
Basic Attack
Melee
16-22 to 421-560 Physical Damage
7.5% chance of 25% Increased Physical Damage
5-7 to 78-147 Aether Damage
Aether Form
20% chance to cast Aether Conflagration when hit by Projectiles
8 to 108 Aether Damage
Aether Shield
9 Seconds Duration
90% Damage Absorption
20% Increased Aether Damage
Aether Conflagration
AoE
3 Meter Radius
6 to 305 Aether Damage
30 to 130 Defensive Ability for 2 seconds (Affects Enemies)
Aether Fire Aura
Buff
16 Meter Radius
20% Increased Life
2 to 82 Aether Damage
8% Chance of 5 to 273 Aether Retaliation
Rally
Buff
Activates when Health is below 18%
5 Seconds Duration
100% Increased Aether Damage
Summon Unstable Aether Formation
Pet
Can summon a maximum of 2 to 4
14 Second Skill Cooldown
Formation summons 2-3 Aether Corruptions
Summons live for 75 Seconds
Resistances
Level 4
Hero/Boss Resistances
Pierce
30%
Elemental
5%
Aether
25%
Knockdown
500%

Dralgar
is a unique Boss creature of the
Aether Corruptions
faction. He spawns immediately from the ground after you pass the barrier into
Gloomwald
from
Burrwitch Village
.

to eliminate Edmund as part of the

quest.

======================================================================
PAGE: Ellena, the First Slith
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Ellena,_the_First_Slith
======================================================================

Ellena, the First Slith
is a unique
boss
creature that can be found in
Hargate's Laboratory
.
She is guarding the room where the
Hargate's Formula
can be found for
The Origin of the Slith
quest.
Family :
Beastkin
Genus:
Slith
Abilities

Skill Type

(17 to 1054) Physical Damage
(28 to 1008) Cold Damage
(20 to 960) Frostburn Damage over 2 Seconds

Notable Drops
Ellena's Necklace
Background
According to
Hargate's Journal - Page 4
, Ellena was Hargate's young daughter.
Hargate was an Arcanist obsessed with the creation of life through the use of Aether. Ellena's mother Helen, a medical expert, helped him with the experiments, but insisted that they be limited to snakes and
Grobles
.
This was not good enough for Hargate, so he sent Ellena and her mother away for the summer to turn to illegal human experiments. "All of the specimens died shortly after the procedure." When Ellena and her mother returned, Helen immediately discovered what Hargate had done. It is implied that Hargate killed her.
Despite all of the failures leading up to this point, Hargate devised the theory that a younger subject would lead to a better result and turned to using his own daughter as test subject. As is evident by the boss's name, this time he succeeded.
Trivia
Ellena carries
a necklace
that she drops upon death. Early in the game, Slith drop necklaces that are useless by themselves but can be
fashioned into a magic ring by the right person
, suggesting their fondness of necklaces came from her.
Strangely, despite the Sliths' reputation for poisoning the water sources where they live and large sections of the laboratory of their creation, where they are the main inhabitants, being covered in toxic water, the room where Ellena is found has the only water in the laboratory that is not harmful to step in.

======================================================================
PAGE: Fabius "the Unseen" Gonzar
CATEGORIES: Nemesis
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Fabius_"the_Unseen"_Gonzar
======================================================================

Fabius "the Unseen" Gonzar
is a
Nemesis Spawn
of the
Cronley's Gang
faction.
He is an Ultra Boss of Grim Dawn so the player must be prepared for that encounter.
Family:
Human
Genus:
Cronley's Gang
Spawn Points
Four Hills
Cronley's Hideout
Hanneffy Mine
Arkovian Foothills
Abilities
Damage Types: Pierce, Bleed, Cold, Physical
Blade Barrier
Blade Swarm
Blade Swarm (Long Range)
Pneumatic Burst
Shadow Strike
Veil of Shadow
Blade Nova
Resistances
Level 5
Hero/Boss Resistances
68% Fire Resistance
93% Cold Resistance
18% Lightning Resistance
18% Poison & Acid Resistance
43% Pierce Resistance
18% Bleeding Resistance
50% Vitality Resistance
18% Aether Resistance
18% Chaos Resistance
Notable Drops
Fabius can drop either of two
Monster Infrequent
Shoulder Armor pieces:
Fabius' Pauldron
Fabius' Shoulderguard
Gallery
Fabius' Spawn Points
Masteries

Galakros, the Mountain
is a unique Boss found in an area blocked by a
Detonation Site
in the
Malmouth sewers
. He is of the
Aether Corruption
faction.

======================================================================
PAGE: Gethrand, the Betrayed
CATEGORIES: Hero Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Gethrand,_the_Betrayed
======================================================================

Gethrand is a
Reanimator
hero creature that can be found in
Living Quarters
area of
Act 1
.
He is a target for the
Bounty: Warden's Pets
.
Family:
Aether Corruption
Genus:
Dominator
Abilities
Aether Conflagration
Aetherfire Aura
Arcane Blast
Ring of Flame
Summon Zombie
Summon Aetherfire Zombie
Resistances
Level 3
Hero/Boss Resistances
Aether: 50%
Knockdown: 500%
Lore
Gethrand's Notes - 1st Entry

Gethrand's Notes - Final Entry

======================================================================
PAGE: Gollus, the Deepdweller
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Gollus,_the_Deepdweller
======================================================================

Gollus, the Deepdweller
is a Unique
Boss
Creature located in the secret area
Den of the Lost
, accessed through the
Skittering Den
. The Skittering Den can be accessed through the
Royal Hive
in the
Rotting Croplands
.
Family:
Beastkin
Genus:
Trog
Abilities
Skill Name
Skill Type
Damage Type
Shadow Strike
Piercing, Acid
Poison Nova
AoE
Acid, Poison
Toxic Spittle
Projectile
Acid & Poison Damage
-25% Total Speed for 5 Seconds
Resistances
Level 3
Hero/Boss Resistances
Cold: 30%
Freeze: 30%
Vitality: 50%
Stun: 33%
Knockdown: 500%
Notable Drops
Gollus' Ring
Trivia
The name "Gollus" (and his ring) is a clear reference to the character Gollum, from J.R.R Tolkien's Lord of the Rings fantasy series.
His bounty
also describes him as a creature that can turn invisible, possibly referencing the One Ring's ability to turn its wearer invisible. The associated achievement "In The Depths, He Lived Forgotten" supports this.

======================================================================
PAGE: Grand Priest Zarthuzellan
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Grand_Priest_Zarthuzellan
======================================================================

Grand Priest Zarthuzellan is a unique
Boss
creature that can be found in
Misery
, the third level of
The Steps of Torment
. Killing him is necessary to complete the
Descent into Torment
quest.
Family:
Undead
Genus:
Skeletal Warlock
Abilities

Skill Type
Damage Type
Void Fire
AoE

3 Meter Radius
Fire Damage
Burn Damage
Sun Spot
Projectile
1 Second Duration
2 Meter radius
x Fire Damage
Curse
Debuff
5 Meter radius
4-6 Second Duration
-10% to -30% Physical Resistance
-25% to -40% Movement Speed
Magical Shield
24 Second Cooldown
(389 to 25649) Damage Absorption
+30% Total Speed
Ranged Blast
2.5 Meter radius
x-y Elemental Damage
33% Chance of x Burn/Frostburn/Electrocte Damage for 3 Seconds
Fire Ball
Projectile
3 Projectiles
1.5 Meter Radius
Fire Damage
Burn Damage
33% Chance to Stun
Fury Aura
Aura, Buff
12 Meter Radius
5% Damage Absorption
Flat Fire Damage
Passive
x Vitality Damage
15% Chance of -8% Current Life
100% Bleeding Resistance with 33% Reduced Duration
33% Reduced Poison Duration
12-18% Chance to Avoid Projectiles
20% Total Speed Reduction Resistance

======================================================================
PAGE: Grava'Thul, the Voiddrinker
CATEGORIES: Nemesis
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Grava'Thul,_the_Voiddrinker
======================================================================

Grava'Thul, the Voiddrinker Is a
Nemesis Spawn
of the
Chthonians
faction.
He is an Ultra Boss of Grim Dawn so the player must be prepared for that encounter.
Family:
Chthonians
Genus:
Spawn Points
Corrupted Tomb
Gryver's Mill
(Elite and Ultimate)
Village of Darkvale
(Elite and Ultimate)
Tomb of Korvaak
Necropolis Interior
Tomb of the Watchers
Seal of the Loghorrean
Mourndale
Cinder Wastes
Fringes of Sanity
Desolate Wastes
Void's Edge
Grava'Thul will, most likely, only spawn in
Act 5
and
Act 6
areas where
Chthonians
spawn, so the
Ashes of Malmouth
expansion is required.

======================================================================
PAGE: Gulgoth, the Rampaging
CATEGORIES: Hero Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Gulgoth,_the_Rampaging
======================================================================

Gulgoth, the Rampaging is a Hero Creature found in Old Arkovia. Killing him is required for the
Troll Rampage
side quest.
Also, he only spawns during this quest, at the crossroads straight west of Old Arkovia riftgate.

======================================================================
PAGE: Gutworm, the Maneater
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Gutworm,_the_Maneater
======================================================================

Gutworm, the Maneater
is a unique
boss
creature found in
Smuggler's Basin
.
He drops no loot himself, other than a low chance to drop
Gutworm's Bloody Seal
, but guards a single
Supreme Chest
that cannot be opened until he has been defeated.
Family:
Beastkin
Genus:
Dranghoul Enforcer
Abilities
Skill Name
Skill Type
Damage Type
Passive
Physical Damage
20% Chance of Bleeding Damage over 8 Seconds
Reduces Defensive Ability for 2 Seconds
10% Total Speed Reduction Resistance
Life Leech
12% Chance to Deflect Projectiles
40% Bleeding Resistance
15% Pierce Resistance
-15% Damage from Eldritch and Magical Creatures
Defiant Roar
AoE
18 Meter Radius
stun target for (2.6 to 3.2) seconds
12-18% reduction to current life
+50% Damage to Eldritch Creatures
Hooked Net
trap
(2 to 2.2) second duration
-20 Defensive Ability
0 movement speed
Gut Slice
melee
9 meter Wave Distance
Physical Damage
Bleeding Damage over 2 Seconds
33% Slow target for 6 seconds
Impale
melee
Physical Damage
Bleeding Damage
Life Leech
33% Slow target for 4 seconds

Physical Damage
stun

Halgavar
is a unique Boss in the
Fleshworks
. He is one of two Bosses to be killed in the area to open the door to Sanctum of Flesh. He is also a target of
Bounty: Fleshwarped Guardians
. He is an
Aether Corruption
enemy type.

======================================================================
PAGE: Halvastra Wrathfire
CATEGORIES: Hero Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Halvastra_Wrathfire
======================================================================

Halvastra Wrathfire is a hero monster from the
Wrathfire Bounty
given by the
Order of Death's Vigil
. He can be found in
The Warden's Cellar
-
Inner Laboratory
section.

======================================================================
PAGE: Harrath the Slaughterer
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Harrath_the_Slaughterer
======================================================================

Harrath the Slaughterer is a unique
Boss
creature that can be found in the
Withering Fields
. Killing him is necessary to complete the
We Need Food
quest.
In order to make the boss appear (and then fight him) the player must first clear the area near
Homestead
Riftgate of all Aetherial threat, including
Nazagrad, the Fallen
.
Family:
Beastkin
-
Aether Corruption
Genus:
Fleshwarped Commander
Abilities
Fire Blast
Flame Rage
Summon
Burning Dead
Summon
Rotting Emberguard
Resistances
Level 3
Hero/Boss Resistances
Aether Resistance 20%
Reduced Cooldown Duration 500%
Physical Resistance 20%
Pierce Resistance 25%
Notable Drops
Supreme Spoils

======================================================================
PAGE: Harrath, the Returned
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Harrath,_the_Returned
======================================================================

Harrath, the Returned
is a unique boss creature that can be found in the
Rotting Croplands
. He spawns when the player get
the Black Legion
's
Bounty: Harrath, Returned
.
He does not have new abilities from his first appearence (see
Harrath the Slaughterer
).
Family:
Beastkin
-
Aether Corruption
Genus:
Fleshwarped Commander
Abilities
Fire Blast
Flame Rage
Summon
Burning Dead
Summon
Rotting Emberguard
Resistances
Level 4
Hero/Boss Resistances
Aether Resistance 20%
Reduced Knockdown Duration 500%
Physical Resistance 20%
Pierce Resistance 25%
Notable Drops
Supreme Spoils
Masteries

PAGE: Harvoul, the Earthshaker

Harvoul, the Earthshaker
is a
Boss
creature that can be encountered in the
Tomb of Korvaak
.
Family:
Undead
Genus:
Ghoul
Abilities
Devour
Cave In
Earth Shatter
Earth Ring
Resistances
Level 3
Hero/Boss Resistances
Physical: 25%
Pierce: 25%
Cold: 50%
Poison & Acid: 50%
Vitality: 100%
Petrify: 500%
Sleep: 500%
Stun: 500%
Trap: 500%
Freeze: 500%
Knockdown: 500%
Notable Drops
Supreme Spoils
Masteries

======================================================================
PAGE: High Priest Rolderathis
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/High_Priest_Rolderathis
======================================================================

High Priest Rolderathis
is a Unique Boss Creature located in the
Sunken Reliquary
.
Family:
Undead
Genus:
Skeletal Warlock
Abilities
Curse of Frailty
Freeze Blast
Frost Aura
Ice Nova
Ice Spike
Summon
Frost Revenant
Summon
Skeletal Knight
Touch of Rolderathis
Resistances
50% Cold Resistance
15% Pierce Resistance
500% Defense Sleep
Notable Drops
Grand Spoils
Rolderathis' Tome
Writings of Rolderathis - 2nd Entry
Masteries

Holdrexna the Windwalker
is a
Harpy
Hero creature that can be found in
Broken Hills
.

Beastkin

Harpy

Windborne
Talon Swipe
Screech
Frenzy aura

Lightning: 40%

Ikrix, the Ravener
is a unique
Boss
creature that can be found in the
Mountain Deeps
.
Family:
Insectoid
Genus:
Rift Scourge
Abilities
Summon Rift Scourge
Ice Nova
Ice Spit
Chilling Front
Resistances
Level 4
Hero/Boss Resistances
Pierce: 25%
Knockdown: 500%
Notable Drops
Grand Spoils
Ancient Heart
Ikrix Scale

======================================================================
PAGE: Ilgorr, the Eternal
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Ilgorr,_the_Eternal
======================================================================

Illgorr, the Eternal is a unique Boss creature that can be found in the fourth level of
The Steps of Torment
:
Suffering
.
The Boss fight is divided in two stages, Ilgorr must be killed a first time. Then he comes back and grow into a Skeletal Titan.
Family:
Undead
Genus:
Skeletal Golem
Abilities
Stage 1 (Skeletal Gargantuan Form)
Bone Prison
Double Strike
Torment
Rally
Summon Ghosts
Summon Revenant
Stage 2 (Skeletal Titan Form)
Bone Wave
Ice Double Claw
Torment
Rally
Summon Ghosts
Spike Nova
Summon Revenant
Resistances
Level 4
Hero/Boss Resistances
Vitality: 50%
Sleep: 500%
Stun: 30%
Knockdown: 500%
Trap: 500%
Notable Drops
Magnificent Spoils
Masteries

Janaxia
is a Human Boss type. Janaxia can be found in
Janaxia's Den
which is located in
Ugdenbog
.

======================================================================
PAGE: Kalis Ka, the Bonehunter
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Kalis_Ka,_the_Bonehunter
======================================================================

Kalis Ka, the Bonehunter is a unique boss creature that can be found in
Craig's Crags
. She must be killed to complete the
Wrath of the Beast
quest, because she drops the
Fang of the Bonehunter
.

======================================================================
PAGE: Karroz, Sigil of Ch'thon
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Karroz,_Sigil_of_Ch'thon
======================================================================

Karroz, Sigil of Ch'thon
is a unique
Boss
creature that can be found at the end of the 2nd level of
Darkvale Gate
. Killing him is necessary to complete the
Reaping What You Sow
quest as he drops the
Karroz's Tome
quest item.
The fight against Karroz is divided in two stages:
You fight
Karroz
himself.
On death, his body is used as a portal by a Chthonian entity:
Thall'Nosh the Unraveller
.
Family:
Human
Genus:
Bloodsworn
Abilities
Karroz, Sigil of Ch'thon
Skill Name
Skill Type
Damage Type
Passive
26% Chaos Resistance
26% Fire Resistance
12% to 14% Chance to Deflect Projectiles
8% Chance to Disrupt Skills for 1.5 Seconds
Chaos Aura
AoE Buff
10 Meter radius
Chaos Damage
+25% Chaos Damage
10% Damage Absorption
Life Leech
Chaos Orb
Projectile
1 Projectile
Chaos Damage
Doom Bolt
1.5 Meter radius
Chaos Damage
Vitality Damage
Curse
debuff
5 Meter radius
8 Second Duration
(-50 to -209)% Health Regeneration
(-35 to -50)% Movement Speed
-4/-10% Offensive Ability
-18/25% Chaos Resistance
-18/25% Poison Resistance
-18/25% Vitality Resistance
Ring of Chaos
Duration AoE
4 Meter radius
6 Second duration
Chaos Damage
66% Chance of one of the following:
Convert target for 4 Seconds
Confuse target for 3 Seconds
Rally
Buff

+30% Vitality Damage

Korvan Sands
.

======================================================================
PAGE: Kra'vall, Ancient of the Waters
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Kra'vall,_Ancient_of_the_Waters
======================================================================

This article is a
stub
. You can help Grim Dawn Wiki by
expanding it
.
This article is a
stub
. You can help Grim Dawn Wiki by
expanding it
.
Kra'vall, Ancient of the Waters
is an optional boss that is a re-skin of
Loghorrean
, the final boss of act 4. He is located in the
Den of the Ancient
.
During the fight He spawns
Slith
adds and uses water nova and ice projectile attacks. He also has several stationary tentacles in the arena that whip attack you when you get close to them. The tentacles can not be attacked.

======================================================================
PAGE: Kubacabra, the Endless Menace
CATEGORIES: Nemesis
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Kubacabra,_the_Endless_Menace
======================================================================

Kubacabra, the Endless Menace
is a giant
Leafmane
and the
Nemesis Spawn
of the
Beasts
faction. He is an Ultra Boss of
Grim Dawn
so the player must be prepared for that encounter.
On Elite and Ultimate Difficulties, this Nemesis in particular can show up in many more areas than on Normal.
The boss fight with Kubacabra is divided into three stages. In the first two stages, each time a form of Kubacabra is killed, it splits into two smaller forms. While each smaller form is a bit weaker, their total damage is more than that of the previous form.
In the first stage, the lone entity named "Kubacabra, the Endless Menace" spawns 2 lesser forms upon death, with each lesser form named "Kubacabra, the Enduring".
In the second stage, the two forms named "Kubacabra, the Enduring" each spawn 2 lesser forms upon death for a total of 4, with each lesser form named "Kubacabra, the Tenacious".
In the third and final stage, the four forms each named "Kubacabra, the Tenacious" will no longer split into smaller forms upon death. These final forms are the only ones that give experience and loot, with all four forms giving the XP reward, but only one of them dropping loot.
If playing in a group, it might help to lure Kubacabra's forms apart, since it might be easier to kill each smaller form individually, than in one big group.
The majority of attacks used by all of Kubacabra's forms deal bleeding damage.

======================================================================
PAGE: Kyzogg the Reanimator
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Kyzogg_the_Reanimator
======================================================================

Kyzogg the Reanimator
is a unique
boss
creature that can be found in
The Burial Cave
. Killing him is necessary to complete the
Waking to Misery
quest.
Family:
Aether Corruption
Genus:
Reanimator

Skill Type

.
This article is a
stub
. You can help Grim Dawn Wiki by
expanding it
.
Larria
is a NPC/Unique Boss. Larria is the target of the quest
Meddling Witch
. She can be found in
Larria's Den
. If you choose to kill her in the quest line she will be a farmable enemy boss.

======================================================================
PAGE: Lokarr
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Lokarr
======================================================================

This article is a
stub
. You can help Grim Dawn Wiki by
expanding it
.
This article is a
stub
. You can help Grim Dawn Wiki by
expanding it
.
Lokarr, Master of the Crucible
is both an NPC and a
Celestial
Super Boss. He is the Facilitator of the
Crucible
, and if you follow the quest
Lokarr's Secret Quest
you will fight him as the boss in the
Crucible of the Dead
.
Tips for fighting him
During the fight he will summon Clones of John Bourbon.
Most of his damage is fire so going in with over capped fire resistance will help tremendously.

======================================================================
PAGE: Loxmere Nightmage
CATEGORIES: Hero Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Loxmere_Nightmage
======================================================================

Loxmere Nightmage is a Possessed Aetherial Hero. He has a single spawn point, in the bottom right corner of the
Plains of Strife
, and appears on Elite and Ultimate difficulties only, with a 40% chance to spawn.
Family:
Aetherial
Genus:
Possessed
Notable Drops
Loxmere's Frostblade
Abilities
Nullification
Shadow Strike
Blade Swarm
Blade Trap
Piercing Aura
Aether Spikes
Ice Spikes
Dual Blades
Amarasta's Quick Cut
Whirling Death
Resistances
Physical:
20%
Pierce:
50%
Lightning:
15%
Aether:
15%
Knockdown:
500%
Level 3

======================================================================
PAGE: Manifestation of Korvaak, the Eldritch Sun
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Manifestation_of_Korvaak,_the_Eldritch_Sun
======================================================================

This article is a
stub
. You can help Grim Dawn Wiki by
expanding it
.
This article is a
stub
. You can help Grim Dawn Wiki by
expanding it
.
Manifestation of Korvaak, the Eldritch Sun
is a
Celestial
Super Boss that is the final boss of the
Forgotten Gods
campaign. He is located in the
Throne of the Three
; defeating him is the goal of
The Forgotten God
quest.
The Manifestation of Korvaak gets progressively stronger as the fight goes on, signified by him breaking free of his bonds more and more. The three stages are:
Korvaak starts the fight with two of his arms still restrained.
After getting his health decreased to around 70 percent, Korvaak smashes the ground continuously, which enables him to break free of the arm restraints.
After getting his health decreased to around 30 percent, Korvaak unleashes his full power, blasting apart his mask and revealing his face. He manifests flames from his limbs and on his back and gains a damaging aura around him.
Abilities
First Stage
Skill Name
Skill Type
Damage Type
Passive
Second Stage
Skill Name
Skill Type
Damage Type
Passive
Third Stage
Skill Name
Skill Type
Damage Type
Passive

======================================================================
PAGE: Master Ravok, the Death's Whisper
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Master_Ravok,_the_Death's_Whisper
======================================================================

Master Ravok, the Death's Whisper,
is a unique
Boss
creature that can be found in
Fort Haron
, if the player has chosen to ally himself with
Kymon's Chosen
.
Killing him is necessary to complete the
Enemy of My Enemy
quest.
Family:
Human
Genus:
Necromancer
location Master Ravok
Abilities
Vitality Orb Burst
Vitality Bolt Nova
Vitality Aura
Summon Fire Revenant
Summon Ice Revenant
Summon Lightning Revenant
Note that Ravok can have up to four Revenants summoned at once.
Resistances
Level 4

Grand Spoils

PAGE: Mesmer
CATEGORIES: Hero Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Mesmer

Mesmer is a hero creature that can be found in
Underground Jail
or
Rotting Croplands
.
Family: Aether Corruption
Genus: Gazer
Abilities
Lightning Orb
Lightning Bolt
Clone self.

======================================================================
PAGE: Milton Hart
CATEGORIES: Hero Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Milton_Hart
======================================================================

Milton Hart
Race
Aether Corruption
Type
Hero
Faction
Aetherials
Milton Hart is a
Rotting Soldier
Hero creature encountered in the
Sodden Hollow
. Killing him is required to complete the
A Sister's Gift
side quest. His house can be found near the road just past the Wightmire
Riftgate
.
Abilities
Charge
Cadence
Will to Live
Resistances
level 1
Hero/Boss Resistances
Aether: 25%
Fire: 25%
Lightning: 15%
Pierce: 15%
Poison: 15%
Stun: 50%
Trap: 50%
Knockdown: 500%
Notable Drops
Hart's Amulet
(quest item)
Milton's Casque
Gallery
Masteries

======================================================================
PAGE: Mogara, the Prime Matriarch
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Mogara,_the_Prime_Matriarch
======================================================================

Mogara, the Prime Matriarch
is a unique
Boss
creature that can be found in the
Jagged Waste
. Killing her is necessary to complete the
Pride of the Jagged Waste
quest.
Family:
Beast
Genus:
Manticore
Abilities:
Skill Name
Skill Type
Damage Type
Passive
Physical Damage
Pierce Damage
Poison Damage over 12 Seconds
10% Chance to deflect Projectiles
Frenzy Aura
AoE buff
10 Meter Radius
+10% Life
+30% Total Speed
Maul
melee
Physical Damage
Bleeding Damge over 3 Seconds
40% Reduced Movement Speed for 3 Seconds
Shadow Strike
Pierce Damage
Vitality Damage
Tail Strike
melee
Pierce Damage
Poison Damge over 8 Seconds
Stun
Resistances
Level 4
Hero/Boss Resistances
Physical: 15%
Sleep: 500%
Trap: 500%
Notable Drops
Grand Spoils
Manticore Eye
Mogara's Fangs
Masteries

======================================================================
PAGE: Moosilauke, the Chillwind
CATEGORIES: Nemesis
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Moosilauke,_the_Chillwind
======================================================================

Moosilauke, the Chillwind
is a
Nemesis
spawn of the
Undead
faction.
He is an Ultra Boss of Grim Dawn so the player must be prepared for that encounter.
The Boss fight is divided in two stages, Moosilauke must be killed a first time. Then he comes back and grow into a Skeletal Titan.
Family:
Undead
Genus:
Skeletal Golem
Spawn Points
Crumbling Watch
Four Hills
Old Arkovia
Arkovian Undercity
Levels 1 & 2
Steps of Torment
Levels 1, 2, 3 & 4
Tomb of Korvaak
Lost Tomb of the Damned
Abilities
Stage 1 (Skeletal Gargantuan Form)
Summon
Revenant
Sky Shard
Summon
Skeletal Archer
Ice Double Claw
Stage 2 (Skeletal Titan Form)
Chilling Surge
Sky Shard Barrage
Summon
Skeletal Archer
Chill Wave
Summon Ice Crystal
Sky Shard
Resistances
50% Cold Resistance
500% Reduced Knockdown Duration
50% Vitality Resistance
20% Physical Resistance
20% Pierce Resistance
Notable Drops
Moosilauke's Pauldrons
Moosilauke's Shoulderguards

======================================================================
PAGE: Nacrathan, the Timeless
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Nacrathan,_the_Timeless
======================================================================

Nacrathan, the Timeless
is a unique
Boss
creature that can be found in the
Lost Tomb of the Damned
.
Nacrathan deals Physical and Vitality damage and uses Life Leech
Family:
Undead
Genus:
Ghoul
Abilities
Devour
Cave In
Drain Soul
Leach Nova
Resistances
Level 3
Hero/Boss Resistances
Physical: 25%
Pierce: 35%
Cold: 50%
Vitality: 100%
Poison % Acid: 50%
Petrify: 500%
Freeze: 500%
Knockdown: 500%
Sleep: 500%
Stun: 500%
Trap: 500%
Notable Drops
Supreme Spoils
Masteries

from

.

This article is a
stub
. You can help Grim Dawn Wiki by
expanding it
.
Namadea, the Screecher
is a boss monster found in the
Barrowholm
cellar if you chose to be hostile to the
people of Barrowholm
. It will drop the
Ugdenbog Fetish
to complete the quest
A Witch's Bargain
.

======================================================================
PAGE: Nicholas Balthazar
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Nicholas_Balthazar
======================================================================

Nicholas Balthazar is a unique
Boss
creature that can be found in
Staunton Mine
. He is guarding some
Dynamite
for the
Clearing the Way
quest.
Family:
Human
Genus:
Cronley's Gang
Abilities
Shield Hammer (Physical Damage, 90% Weapon Damage)
Blade Arc (Internal Trauma Damage, 130% Weapon Damage)
Might Aura (+5% To All Damage
Resistances
Level 2
Hero/Boss Resistances
Knockdown: 500%
Notable Drops
Heroic Spoils
Scrap
Masteries

======================================================================
PAGE: Noveria Stormfire (Undead)
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Noveria_Stormfire_(Undead)
======================================================================

Noveria Stormfire
in her Undead form is a unique boss creature that can be found in the
Chamber of Souls
in the
Bastion of the Order
during the quest
Service Beyond Death
. Killing her is necessary to complete the quest.
Family :
Undead
Genus :
Haunted Noble
Abilities
Arcane Missile
Chilling Surge
Mind Over Matter
Teleport
Rime Fire
Ice Armor Aura
Notable Drops
Grand Spoils
Masteries

======================================================================
PAGE: Okaloth - "The Messenger"
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Okaloth_-_"The_Messenger"
======================================================================

This article is a
stub
. You can help Grim Dawn Wiki by
expanding it
.
This article is a
stub
. You can help Grim Dawn Wiki by
expanding it
.
Okaloth - "The Messenger"
is a boss located in the
Pit of Atonement
. The quest to defeat him in
Act 7
is offered by
Seer Laurna
in the
Vanguard of the Three
. Okaloth - "The Messenger" was previously known in game only as
The Messanger
and is part of the
Kymon's Chosen
quest line in the final quest
Kymon's Secret
received at
Honored
status as the final quest.

======================================================================
PAGE: Ol' Bloodbriar (creature)
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Ol'_Bloodbriar_(creature)
======================================================================

Ol' Bloodbriar is a unique
Boss
creature that can be found in the
Bloodbriar's Lair
. Killing him is necessary to complete the
Ol'Bloodbriar
quest.
Family:
Riftspawn
Genus:
Thorned Horror
Abilities:
Slash
Bloody Roar
Bloody Spines
Slam
Resistances
Level 4
Hero/Boss Resistances
Poison: 25%
Stun: 500%
Knockdown: 500%
Notable Drops
Grand Spoils
Masteries

======================================================================
PAGE: Overlord Van Aldritch
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Overlord_Van_Aldritch
======================================================================

Overlord Van Aldritch
Race
Aether Corruption
Type
Boss
Faction
Aetherials
Overlord Van Aldritch
is the final Boss creature for
Port Valbury
. He spawns together with
Councilman Garl
and
Councilman Hallos
.
The three pass around Aldritch's Scepter, indicated by an icon above their head. Whichever holds the scepter gains the
Scepter Storm
buff and the
Aetherbolt Nova
Skill.
Aditionally, On death, Overlord Van Aldritch confers another buff on remaining Councillors (see below).
Lore
After the fate of Port Valbury was sealed, the Aetherial known as Aldritch shed its human form and embraced the tainted nature of the Aether itself. Having turned the entire council of Valbury under its sway, it now rules over the fallen city with a strange relic known as the Scepter of Aldritch in hand.
Abilities

40% Damage Absorption
+40/60% Total Damage
+20/50% Life Regeneration

8 Projectiles in a 360 Degree Radius

Packla, the Turning
is a unique Wendigo
Boss
creature. He has six possible spawn points around
Gloomwald
.

======================================================================
PAGE: Plagius, the Decrepit
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Plagius,_the_Decrepit
======================================================================

Plagius, the Decrepit
is a unique
Boss
creature that can be found in
The Black Sepulcher
.
Family:
Undead
Genus:
Ghoul
Abilities
Plague
Poison Spit
Venom Plague
Devour
Poison Nova
Resistances
Level 3
Hero/Boss Resistances
Physical: 25%
Pierce: 50%
Cold: 30%
Chaos: 30%
Poison % Acid: 50%
Petrify: 500%
Sleep: 500%
Stun: 500%
Trap: 500%
Freeze: 500%
Knockdown: 500%
Notable Drops
Supreme Spoils
Masteries

======================================================================
PAGE: Primordian, the Forgotten One
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Primordian,_the_Forgotten_One
======================================================================

Primordian, the Forgotten One
is a boss creature that can be found in a
Cavern
in the
Foggy Bank
area.
Family:
Beastkin
Genus:
Slith
Abilities
Tidal Wave
Ice projectiles
Frigid Ring
Ice Armor
Resistance
20% Cold Resistance
500% Reduced Freeze Duration
500% Reduced Knockdown Duration
8% Physical Resistance
8% Pierce Resistance
25% Poison & Acid Resistance
Notable Drops
Ancient Heart
Putrid Necklace
Grand Spoils
Masteries

Pusquill the Hoarder
is a unique
boss
creature that can be found in the
Putrid Den
.
Family :
Beast
Genus :
Bone Rat

Skill Name
Skill Type
Damage Type
Passive

Spines

Physical/Pierce
Festering Wave
wave attack

500% Knockdown Resistance

Bernard's Slightly-Chewed Buckler
Pusquill's Tail

======================================================================
PAGE: Rag'Nadar, the Great Maw
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Rag'Nadar,_the_Great_Maw
======================================================================

Rag'Nadar, the Great Maw is a unique
Boss
creature that can be found in the
Ashen Waste
.
Family:
Chthonic
Genus:
Chthonian Devourer
Quests
Bounty: Rag'Nadar
Abilities
Chomp
Fire Vomit
Summon Chthonian Devourer
Warp Wave
Resistances
Level 4
Hero/Boss Resistances
Physical: 15
Pierce: 15
Fire: 25
Vitality: 25
Chaos: 25
Notable Drops
Supreme Spoils
Masteries

Ramzul, High Priest of Osyr
is an
Undead
boss located in the
Temple of Osyr
. He is in the room with the item needed for the quest
The Eye of Ekur
.

======================================================================
PAGE: Rashalga, the Mad Queen

Rashalga, The Mad Queen
is a unique
Boss
creature that can be found in the
Foundation of Corpses
.
She is an Ultra Boss of Grim Dawn so the player must be prepared for that encounter.
Family:
Insectoid
Genus:
Dermapteran

Skill Type
Damage Type

Reduced Defensive Ability for 6 Seconds

Buff

+33% Physical Damage
15% Reduction to Current Life
+(25 to 39)% Total Speed
12% Health Restored

4 Meter radius
Vitality Damage
Life Leech
-(25 to 54)% to All Resistances for 5 Seconds

orbiting projectile

Reaper of the Lost
is a
Nemesis
boss for
the Barrowholm faction
. The Reaper is an
undead
beast
and one of the strongest nemeses the player can face.
Spawn Locations
Altar of Rattosh
Den of the Wendigo
Forlorn Cellar
Gloomwald
Ugdenbog

PAGE: Rodalgar, the Flesh Collector

This article is a
stub
. You can help Grim Dawn Wiki by
expanding it
.
This article is a
stub
. You can help Grim Dawn Wiki by
expanding it
.
Rodalgar
is a unique Boss in the
Fleshworks
. He is one of two Bosses to be killed in the area to open the door to Sanctum of Flesh. He is also a target of
Bounty: Fleshwarped Guardians
. He is an
Aether Corruption
enemy type.

Wasp
boss creature that can be found in
Stirring Hive
.

======================================================================
PAGE: Rosena Malgos ~ Regenerator
CATEGORIES: Hero Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Rosena_Malgos_~_Regenerator
======================================================================

Rosena Malgos is a hero creature that can be found on the second floor of the
Arkovian Undercity
or
The Steps of Torment
Family: Undead
Genus: ?

======================================================================
PAGE: Rutnick the Cruel
CATEGORIES: Hero Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Rutnick_the_Cruel
======================================================================

Rutnick the Cruel
is a deserter from
Cronley's Gang
who led a large number of other gang members to hide-out in the
Arkovian Docks
. He became alienated from
Darius Cronley
owing to the latter's desire to assault
Devil's Crossing
. In the game, he is a powerful hero creature and essentially the boss of this docks area.
Family: Human
Genus: Outlaw

======================================================================
PAGE: Salazar, Blade of Ch'thon
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Salazar,_Blade_of_Ch'thon
======================================================================

Salazar, Blade of Ch'thon
, is a unique
Boss
found in the
Depraved Sanctuary
. He is accompanied by
Salazar's Harbinger
.
He has a chance to drop
Salazar's Sovereign Blade
, a rare Monster Infrequent item.
Family:
Human
Genus:
Bloodsworn

======================================================================
PAGE: Sister Bravna, the Skybreaker
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Sister_Bravna,_the_Skybreaker
======================================================================

Sister Bravna, the Skybreaker is a unique
Boss
creature that can be found in
Fort Haron
if the player as chosen to ally with the
Order of Death's Vigil
.
Family:
Human
Genus:
Kymon's Chosen
Quests
Bounty: The Skybreaker
Abilities
Lightning Charge
Ring of Lightning
Lightning Orb Nova
Shield Defense
Electric Aura
Resistances
Level 4
Hero/Boss Resistances
Notable Drops
Grand Spoils
Masteries

is a Basilisk
Beast

Feral Thicket
.

======================================================================
PAGE: Swarm Queen Ravna
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Swarm_Queen_Ravna
======================================================================

Swarm Queen Ravna
is a unique
Boss
creature that can be found in the final sub-area of the
Royal Hive
,
Hive Queen's Lair
. Killing her is necessary to complete the
Culling the Swarm
quest.
The entire room is filled with eggs ready to hatch Weavils.
The Boss fight is divided in two stages:
1.) Ravna is immobile at first, attached to her abdomen, summoning Dermapterans to fight the player and attacking with poison projectiles.
2.) Once her health bar is fully depleted, Ravna detaches herself from her abdomen, becoming mobile and pursuing the player with melee attacks.
Family:
Insectoid
Genus:
Dermapteran
Stage 1 (Fertile Form)
Abilities
Poison Spit
Hive Aura
Summon
Dermapteran Sentinel
Summon
Dermapteran Weavil
Swipe
Poison Triple Spit
Resistances
Level 4
Hero/Boss Resistances
Fire Resistance 15%
Reduced Freeze Duration 500%
Reduced Petrify Duration 500%
Pierce Resistance 20%
Sleep Resistance 500%
Reduced Stun Duration 500%
Reduced Entrapment Duration 500%
Stage 2 (Fighter Form)
Abilities
Acid Impale
Drop Ceiling
Charge
Resistances
Level 4
Hero/Boss Resistances
Fire Resistance 15%
Reduced Knockdown Duration 500%
Pierce Resistance 20%
Notable Drops
Supreme Spoils
Ravna's Guard
Empowered Ravna's Guard

Tenebris is a hero creature that can be found on the second floor of the
Arkovian Undercity
.

Genus: Skeletal Priest

======================================================================
PAGE: The Amalgamation
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/The_Amalgamation
======================================================================

The Amalgamation is a
Boss
creature located in
The Gruesome Harvest
.
Abilities
Summon Aether Corruptions
Aether Blastwave
Aether Flame Jets
Melee attacks
Resistances
Level 4
Hero/Boss Resistances
Physical: 20%
Pierce: 30%
Fire: 10%
Aether: 25%
Stun: 500%
Knockdown: 500%
Notable Drops
Supreme Spoils
Note:
The Amalgamation
Pulsing Shard
(Rare Monster Infrequent Off-Hand)
Masteries

======================================================================
PAGE: The Iron Maiden
CATEGORIES: Nemesis
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/The_Iron_Maiden
======================================================================

The Iron Maiden
is a
Nemesis Spawn
of the
Kymon's Chosen
faction.
She is an Ultra Boss of Grim Dawn so the player must be prepared for that encounter.
The player must be sided with The
Order of Death's Vigil
to encounter her.
Family:
Human
Genus:
Zealot
Spawn Points
She can spawn in the areas where the Kymon's Chosen are located:
Fort Haron
Fort Ikon
Tomb of Archon Barthollem
Abilities
Shield Hammer
Blade Arc
Blitz
Cadence
Overguard
Ring of iron
Fighting Spirit
Weapon Pool
Will to Live
Resistances
50% Fire Resistance
500% Reduced Knockdown Duration
50% Lightning Resistance
20% Physical Resistance
20% Pierce Resistance
Notable Drops
Iron Maiden's Mantle
Iron Maiden's Shoulderguard
Masteries
Items

Factions
Locations

======================================================================
PAGE: The Master of Flesh - Theodin Marcell
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/The_Master_of_Flesh_-_Theodin_Marcell
======================================================================

The Master of Flesh - Theodin Marcell
is the final
Boss
of
Act 6
and the
Ashes of Malmouth
expansion. He is located in the
Sanctum of Flesh
.
The Master of Flesh has three forms, and the fight is divided into three corresponding stages:
Theodin Marcell is immobile. He will use several melee attacks, cast a projectile nova, and also periodically summon
Aetherial Bloaters
and
Aetherial Stormbearers
.
During the second stage he breaks free of his restraints and uses a new set of skills, including a telegraphed meteor shower.
In the third stage he transforms into a wraith-like form with another set of skills, including telegraphed AoE.

======================================================================
PAGE: The Ravager (BOSS)
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/The_Ravager_(BOSS)
======================================================================

This article is a
stub
. You can help Grim Dawn Wiki by
expanding it
.
This article is a
stub
. You can help Grim Dawn Wiki by
expanding it
.
The Ravager
is a
Celestial
Super Boss in
Barrowholm
. He takes one of 3 different forms depending on your choice in the quest
Cast Off the Flesh
.
He is the deity the denizens of
Barrowholm
worship. The fight must be initiated through a dialogue, similar to that of
Avatar of Mogdrogen
.
If you manage to kill Ravager, he will simply respawn on your next session and comment on your surprising strength. You can then fight him again to farm multiple
Ravager's Gazes
, or
Ravager's Dreadgazes
on Ultimate, which he always drops. The item's appearance and resistance bonus change depending on which form of Ravager you killed. While rarely an efficient method of obtaining them, Ravager is also the only enemy in the game guaranteed to drop a
Wendigo Spirit
upon death.
Family:
Celestial
Genus:
Wendigo
Background
Ravager fought against
Mogdrogen
and lost. He holds a grudge against the current god of beasts for banishing him into the Aether. He has been plotting his revenge with the help of the
Barrowholm (Faction)
, manipulating them into granting him a new physical form.
Ravager strongly opposes the
Chthonians
for contesting his claim over the lives of mortals as prey.
While killing Aetherials does not raise Barrowholm faction, from how he speaks to the player if the player asks him to turn them into a Wendigo, he also despises the Aetherials, stating that the only reason he has not immediately killed the player who he can sense has been "tainted" by Aetherial possession is because of their service in returning him from the Aether.

======================================================================
PAGE: The Warden (creature)
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/The_Warden_(creature)
======================================================================

See:
Warden Krieg
,
The Warden (Quest)
The Warden is a unique
Boss
creature that can be found in
Hidden Laboratory
, and is the final boss for
Act 1
. His location is at the far North end past the
Underground Jail
.
The Boss fight is divided in two stages, The Warden must first be killed in his Human Form, then he comes back in his Mutated Form and must be killed a second time.
Family:
Aetherial
Genus:
Possessed

This article is a
stub
. You can help Grim Dawn Wiki by
expanding it
.
Tirgan, the Mad Priest
is a
Human
Boss. He is located in the
Sandblown Ruins
and is required to be killed in the quest
Tomb Brothers
.

Burrwitch Outskirts
.

======================================================================
PAGE: Ugdall, Wrath of the Ugdenbog
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Ugdall,_Wrath_of_the_Ugdenbog
======================================================================

This article is a
stub
. You can help Grim Dawn Wiki by
expanding it
.
This article is a
stub
. You can help Grim Dawn Wiki by
expanding it
.
Ugdall
is a Boss creature of the
Undead Faction
. He can be found in the
Tomb of Ugdall
which is in
Ugdenbog
. When you first approach you are given the quest
The Wraith of Ugdenbog
. If you choose to kill him he will be a farmable boss.
Location of the Tomb of Ugdall

======================================================================
PAGE: Ungoliax, the Gloomweaver
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Ungoliax,_the_Gloomweaver
======================================================================

Ungoliax, the Gloomweaver is a unique
Boss
creature that can be found in
Forgotten Depths
. Killing her is necessary for
The Gloomweaver
quest. She is clearly a tribute to Ungoliant, an evil spirit in the Tolkien mythos who appears in the form of a spider. The Forgotten Depths also contain the hero
Shelleb, the Darkness
, an allusion to another of Tolkien's giant spiders, Shelob.
Family:
Arachnid
Genus:
Terrorweave Matriarch
Abilities:
Summon Spiderling
Summons 6
Terrorweave Spiderlings
12 Summon Limit
Blinding Bolt
8 Second Duration
-25% Current Life
50% chance to Fumble for 1 Second
-33% Light Radius
-30% Movement Speed
Chilling Charge
+90% Movement Speed
Cold Damage
25% Reduced Movement Speed for 3 Seconds
Triple Attack
3 Projectiles
Cold Damage
Frostburn Damage over 3 Seconds
30% Reduced Total Speed for 3 Seconds
Passive
Physical damage
Cold Damage
Resistances
Level 4
Hero/Boss Resistances
Pierce: 25%
Lightning: 25%
Poison: 25%
Knockdown: 500%
Notable Drops:
Grand Spoils
Masteries
Items

======================================================================
PAGE: Uroboruuk's Guardian
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Uroboruuk's_Guardian
======================================================================

Uroboruuk's Guardian
is a unique boss creature that can be found in
Craig's Crags
during
The Search for Uroboruuk
quest.
Killing him is necessary to complete the quest because he loot the
Uroboruuk's Notes
.
Family:
Undead
Genus:
Skeletal Golem
Abilities
Double Strike
Doom Bolt
Guardian's Enrage
Chaos Strike
Chaos Form
Summon
Apparition
Chaos Barrage
Notable Drops
Grand Spoils
Uroboruuk's Notes
(quest)
Uroboruuk's Journal - Page 2
(notes)

======================================================================
PAGE: Valdaran, the Storm Scourge

======================================================================

Valdaran, the Storm Scourge
is a
Nemesis Spawn
of the
Aetherials
Faction.
He is an Ultra Boss of Grim Dawn so the player must be prepared for that encounter.
Family:
Aether Corruption
Genus:
Dominator

Sodden Hollow
(Elite and Ultimate)

Venarius, the Backbreaker
is a unique
Boss
creature that can be found in
Stonerend Quarry
.
Family:
Aether Corruption
Genus:
Flesh Hulk
Abilities
Charge
Aether Stomp
Aether Explosion
Aether Smash
Aether Field
Devastation
Resistances
Level 5
Hero/Boss Resistances
Aether Resistance 80%
Fire Resistance 18%
Reduced Freeze Duration 500%
Reduced Knockdown Duration 500%
Reduced Petrify Duration 500%
Physical Resistance 20%
Pierce Resistance 50%
Poison & Acid Resistance 20%
DefenseSleep 500%
Reduced Stun Duration 500%
Reduced Entrapment Duration 500%

Grand Spoils

Viloth, the Corruptor
is a unique
boss
creature that can be found in the
Devil's Aquifer
. Killing her is necessary to complete the
And Not a Drop to Drink
quest.
Family:
Beastkin
Genus:
Slith

30 Second Duration
15% Damage Absorption
+30% to All Damage
Festering Pool
AoE
3 Meter Radius
8 Second Duration
x Physical Damage
x Cold Damage
X Acid Damage
Poison Nova
projectile poison dmg nova
12 Projectiles in a 360 degree arc
x Physical Damage

wave attack
x Physical Damage
x Cold Damage
x Poison Damage over 3 Seconds

Vladox
is a Hero
Riftspawn
that can be encountered throughout
Act 1
and
Ugdenbog
Vladox has the following qualities:
Deals physical, piercing, and bleeding damage
Applies movement speed debuffs
Is resistant to vitality damage

======================================================================
PAGE: Voldrak, the Destroyer
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Voldrak,_the_Destroyer
======================================================================

Voldrak, the Destroyer
is a Unique
Boss
creature encountered in
Smuggler's Pass
.
Killing him is necessary to access the
Prospector's Trail
.
Family:
Beastkin
Genus:
Troll
Abilities
Overpowering Roar
Overhead Smash
Ground Breaker
Enrage
Rage
Overpowering Stench
Resistances
Level 4
Hero/Boss Resistances
Pierce: 18%
Vitality: 20%
Poison: 50%
Sleep: 500%
Stun: 500%
Trap: 500%
Petrify: 500%
Freeze: 500%
Knockdown: 500%
Notable Drops
Grand Spoils
Troll Bonecrusher
50% Chance)
Blueprint: Relic - Mistborn Talisman
(2% Chance)
Ancient Heart
(15% Chance)
Masteries

Watcher Brandis
Race
Aether Corruption
Type
Boss
Faction
Aetherials
Watcher Brandis
is a unique
Boss
creature that can be found in
Port Valbury: High Town
.
He shares a similar skill set with
Watcher Ordas
and
Watcher Ygraad
.

Watcher Ordas
Race
Aether Corruption
Type
Boss
Faction
Aetherials
Watcher Ordas
is a unique
Boss
creature that can be found in
Port Valbury: Old Town
.
He shares a similar skill set with
Commander Lucius
,
Watcher Brandis
and
Watcher Ygraad
.

Watcher Ygraad
Race
Aether Corruption
Type
Boss
Faction
Aetherials
Watcher Ygraad
is a unique
Boss
creature that can be found in
Port Valbury: High Town
.
He shares a similar skill set with
Watcher Ordas
and
Watcher Brandis
.

======================================================================
PAGE: Wraith of Sorrows
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Wraith_of_Sorrows
======================================================================

The Wraith of Sorrows is a unique
Boss
creature that can be found in
The Bone Pit
. Killing her is necessary to complete the
A Stranger in Need
quest. The Wraith of Sorrows has lived for centuries feasting on the life force of unfortunate souls.
Family:
Undead
Genus:
Haunted Noble
Abilities
Ghostly Fireball Nova
Drain Spirit
Vitality Nova
Shadow Strike
Rime Fire
Resistances
Level 4
Hero/Boss Resistances
Physical: 15%
Pierce: 15%: 30%
Vitality
Sleep: 500%
Knockdown: 500%
Notable Drops
Grand Spoils
Spectral Crown
Masteries

======================================================================
PAGE: Zantarin, the Immortal
CATEGORIES: Nemesis
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Zantarin,_the_Immortal
======================================================================

Zantarin, the Immortal
is a
Nemesis Spawn
of The
Order of Death's Vigil
Faction.
He is an Ultra Boss of Grim Dawn so the player must be prepared for that encounter.
The player must be sided with the
Kymon's Chosen
to encounter him.
Family:
Undead
Genus: Warock
Spawn Points
He can spawn in the areas where the Order of Death's Vigil are located:
Fort Haron
Fort Ikon
Tomb of Archon Barthollem
Abilities
Summon
Death Revenant
Vitality Burst
Undeath Missiles
Death Aura
Vitality Nova Barrage
Curse
Bone Shield
Resistances
50% Cold Resistance
500% Reduced Knockdown Duration
50% Vitality Resistance
20% Physical Resistance
20% Pierce Resistance
Notable Drops
Zantarin's Mantle
Zantarin's Shoulderguard
Gallery
Masteries

======================================================================
PAGE: Zaria, the Carver
CATEGORIES: Boss Creatures
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Zaria,_the_Carver
======================================================================

Zaria, the Carver is a unique
Boss
creature that can be found in the
Village of Darkvale
, outside the entrance to
Darkvale Gate
; Killing her is not necessary to enter.
Family:
Human
Genus:
Bloodsworn
Abilities
Chaos Bolt
Chaos Aura
Pox
